# .github/ Governance

**Owner:** @livepeer/docs-team
**Framework:** [GitHub Actions Framework](../docs-guide/frameworks/github-actions.mdx)
**Standards:** Workflow naming: `type-concern-verb-name.yml`
**Decisions:** [.github/workspace/decisions-log.mdx](workspace/decisions-log.mdx)
**Status:** Active — 8 locked decisions (D-ACT-01 through D-ACT-08)

CI/CD workflows, issue/PR templates, and Copilot instructions. Workflows follow the 7-type taxonomy with pipeline tags (P2-P6).
